body_txt: "The bigger the penis, the better the sex." This assumption is a staple of modern fiction when it comes to Sex Tropes . The basic (mistaken) rationale seems to be that a woman's erogenous zones are located in the furthest reaches of her nethers, where only equipment of sufficient size (i.e. length) can venture. Anything lesser may as well not be there at all. This trope is the reason why Compensating for Something is, by its very nature, an insult: everybody knows that a real man is packing (or at the very least, isn't coming up short in that department). It's the villains and losers who get the Teeny Weenie gags, either personally or through visual metaphor . This shortcoming either suggests a similar deficiency of moral character — they've got the dick they deserve — or it explains why they're so frustrated with life (and so obsessed with the hero's girlfriend). By further... em... extension, good people have good sex because their anatomy is just as forthright and upstanding as the rest of them. Some authors even provide length and girth numbers for this uberpenis, conjuring the mental image of a PoV -character breaking out a measuring tape at a romantically inappropriate moment. Unsurprisingly, most writers don't really think through the Real Life implications of a twelve-inch penis — for more detail, please refer to Big Prick, Big Problems . Super-Trope to Black Is Bigger in Bed , which assumes that black men are "gifted" with bigger dicks than men of other ethnicities. When a large shlong has comedic value instead of (or in addition to) sexual value, see Gag Penis . Contrast with Teeny Weenie , which is a penis that is smaller than the average, and often leads to mockery of the guy who has it because of this trope, and with Big Prick, Big Problems , when a large penis is shown to cause problems for its owner. The female equivalent to this trope is Buxom Beauty Standard . Often related to Raging Stiffie . When taken to extremes can become a case of Anatomically Impossible Sex or alternately of Writers Cannot Do Math .
